title: Chrono Domain
description: A Mod that allows you to bend the flow of time in Minecraft. Slow down or speed up entity to make it chaotic. Optimize farms and machines across chunks with the Time Station. Speed up chosen entity or even slow them down to satisfy your chaotic desires.
body:
# Chrono Domain

## Control Time, Control Reality

Chrono Domain is a Fabric mod that gives you the power to manipulate time in your Minecraft world. Speed up entities to see them zoom across your world, or slow them down to a crawl for precise observation and interaction. You can speed up normal mechanics, to make your farms work faster, your furnace smelt faster, your crop grow faster, and even other aspects.

## Warnings
- It affects all entities except for the player
- Doesn't work on scheduled tick like, redstone, fluid motion and others, as I cant seem to get it work

## Features

### Time Crystals
- **Time Crystal**: Accelerate entities to move at enhanced speeds (default 10x faster)
- **Slow Time Crystal**: Dramatically slow entities down (default 0.1x speed)
- Use on any mob to instantly apply the time effect

### Time Station
- Create time-affected zones that apply time effects to all entities within a chunk
- Visual boundary indicators with particles
- Perfect for farms, mob arenas, or even experimental builds

### Commands
- `/SetTimeFactor <value>` - Configure the acceleration factor (default: 10.0)
- `/SetSlowTimeFactor <value>` - Configure the slow-down factor (default: 0.1)
- `/GetTimeFactor` - Check current time factor settings
- `/GetEntityRegistered` - List all entities currently affected by time manipulation

## How It Works

### Time Crystals
- Right clicking on entities will fasten or slow their local tick speed

### Time Station
- Right clicking it with a normal Time Crystal would activate it and cause it to apply a time effect to the specific chunk it is in

### Time manipulation effects:
- Entity movement and physics
- Block random ticks 
- Block entity ticking
- Projectile trajectories
- And more!

## Compatibility

Built for Minecraft with Fabric API. Compatible with most other mods.

Required dependencies:
- Fabric API

## Future Plans

- More time-related items and blocks
- Fixing scheduled tick
- Additional visual effects
- Configuration options

## Support & Feedback

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Let me know in the issues section!

_**Bend time to your will and reshape your Minecraft world with Chrono Domain.**_
